log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dragonborn — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 10 falling damage. HP: 168/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.

Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Dragonborn — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dragonborn — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

→ Dragonborn — Iron Concentration healed for 5 HP. HP: 21/67

Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 2/67

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
